title: 8 Things That Change When a Man of God Actually Prays
caption:
Not the Sunday-morning version. The actual, daily, honest kind.

His mouth slows down. His fear gets smaller. He stops performing. His anger cools faster. He starts seeing people differently. His conscience gets louder. His patience finds a floor. He becomes harder to rattle.

Prayer isn't the spiritual discipline that gets you brownie points. It's the one that changes what you are. The man who talks to God daily is a different man than the one who doesn't — and the people around him feel it before they can name it.

"Do not be anxious about anything, but in every situation, by prayer and petition, with thanksgiving, present your requests to God." — Philippians 4:6

Save this for the man who's been meaning to get his prayer life right.

#faith #prayer #christianmen #godlymen #manofgod #thevision #chaseGod #christianity #philippians4
theme: He chases God, not a wife.
